title: SAP FICO Lead
description:
Job Description

We are seeking a self-starter with an innovative mindset who enjoys experimenting with new technologies and driving business transformation through SAP Finance. The ideal candidate possesses excellent communication and presentation skills to engage stakeholders at all levels, with a proven ability to facilitate workshops and co-create fit-for-purpose solutions that align with organizational goals. They demonstrate strong interpersonal and collaboration skills, working effectively across functional and technical teams, and exhibit critical thinking, ownership, and end-to-end accountability in delivering impactful outcomes.

Primary Skills: Expertise in SAP S/4HANA Finance and Controlling (FICO), with strong functional knowledge across key Finance processes — Record to Report (R2R), Invoice to Collection (I2C), and Procure to Pay (P2P).

Qualifications & Experience

  • Minimum 10+ years of hands-on System Implementation Experience in SAP FICO
  • Hands-on experience with SAP S/4HANA implementations or upgrades.
  • Strong understanding of end-to-end business processes in project-based organizations.
  • Experience with integration points to external systems and related SAP modules (e.g., FI/CO, SD, MM).
  • Proven experience in functional design, configuration, and data migration.
  • SAP certification in S/4HANA (desirable).
  • Techno Design experience specific to data modeling, class definition, UI design and workflow design.
  • Debug SAP standard and custom program to understand the as-is system design.
  • Experience Functional, Integration and User Acceptance testing of large SAP implementations. Understanding of defining and setting up Batch processing and Regression Testing
  • Flexibility and ability to prioritize multiple tasks in a dynamic environment with tight deadlines
  • Ability to define and document integration test scenarios
  • Possessing leadership skill demonstrated by team-leading experience in consulting background.
  • Ability in managing multiple stakeholders.
  • Exposure to several different client industries.
  • Experience in pre-sales activity is preferable.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and coach junior SAP Finance analysts, manage workplan and deliverables, timeline, resource and budget for the project team
  • Lead and facilitate business process workshops to gather, analyze, and document requirements.
  • Re-engineer and design optimized to-be business processes leveraging SAP S/4HANA capabilities.
  • Translate business requirements into functional specifications and work closely with technical teams for detailed technical designs.
  • Perform system configuration and customization of SAP Finance and Controlling PS and its integration with related modules (e.g., MM, SD).
  • Design and support the implementation of interfaces between SAP FICO and external systems.
  • Plan and execute data migration activities including mapping, transformation, and validation strategies.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams (both internal and external) to ensure a cohesive and integrated SAP solution.
  • Manage testing phases (unit, integration, UAT) and resolve defects in a timely manner.
  • Contribute to cutover planning and provide post-go-live support.
  • Co-create innovative and future-ready solutions that are scalable, sustainable, and aligned to industry best practices.
  • Prepare and deliver presentations, training, and documentation for stakeholders and end-users.

postedCompany.description:
Join Accenture and help transform leading organizations and communities around the world. The sheer scale of our capabilities and client engagements and the way we collaborate, operate and deliver value provides an unparalleled opportunity to grow and advance. Choose Accenture, and make delivering innovative work part of your extraordinary career.

Accenture people build careers in four different areas of our business: Consulting, Technology, Outsourcing and internal Corporate Functions. Each area offers a unique career experience and a compelling mix of work and training opportunities, work environment and structure for career progression.

 

Please visit our career website to find out more information of our available open roles:

http://careers.accenture.com/sg-en/Pages/index.aspx
